metadata_list

rows.into_iter()
            .map(|row| {
                (
                    row.try_get("", "sink_id").unwrap(),
                    row.try_get("", "epoch").unwrap(),
                    row.try_get("", "sink_state").unwrap(),
                    row.try_get("", "metadata").unwrap(),
                    row.try_get::<Option<SinkSchemachange>>("", "schema_change")
                        .unwrap()
                        .map(|v| v.to_protobuf()),
                )
            }).collect

self.orig_value
                    .expect("self.staging_entry was vacant, so orig_value must be some").clone
anyhow::anyhow!("CDC table backfill reschedule is unavailable because the system is in recovery state").into
anyhow::anyhow!("Creating sink into table is not allowed for unmigrated table {}. Please migrate it first.", table_id).into

anyhow!(
                        "new table columns does not contains all original columns. new: {:?}, original: {:?}, not included: {:?}",

anyhow!(

sinks
                        .iter()

                            original_sink_id: sink.original_sink.id,
                            columns: sink.new_schema.clone(),

anyhow!("snapshot_backfill not enabled for table and source").into

target_table
            .distribution_key
            .iter()
            .map(|dist_idx| {
                let column_id = target_table.columns[*dist_idx as usize]
                    .column_desc
                    .as_ref()
                    .unwrap()
                    .column_id;
                let sink_idx = sink_idx_by_col_id
                    .get(&column_id)
                    .ok_or_else(|| anyhow::anyhow!("column id {} not found in sink", column_id))?;
                Ok(*sink_idx)
            })
            .collect::<anyhow::Result<Vec<_>>>

upstream_sink_infos
                .iter()
                .map(|info| PbUpstreamSinkInfo {
                    upstream_fragment_id: info.sink_fragment_id,
                    sink_output_schema: info.sink_output_fields.clone(),
                    project_exprs: info.project_exprs.clone(),
                }).collect

                            upstream_source_fragment_id = upstream_source_fragment_id,

functions.name: run_create_streaming_job_command
params:
CreateStreamingJobContext {
            streaming_job,
            upstream_fragment_downstreams,
            database_resource_group,
            definition,
            create_type,
            job_type,
            new_upstream_sink,
            snapshot_backfill_info,
            cross_db_snapshot_backfill_info,
            fragment_backfill_ordering,
            locality_fragment_state_table_mapping,
            cdc_table_snapshot_splits,
            is_serverless_backfill,
            streaming_job_model,
            refresh_interval_sec,
            ..
        }

functions.name: replace_stream_job
params:
ReplaceStreamJobContext {
            old_fragments,
            replace_upstream,
            upstream_fragment_downstreams,
            tmp_id,
            streaming_job,
            drop_table_connector_ctx,
            auto_refresh_schema_sinks,
            streaming_job_model,
            database_resource_group,
        }
